reviews.review_description: nice VR game,i love shooting and boxing.i hope the game gets better.

reviews.review_title: Please read this higo party developers
reviews.review_description: There’s a bug in your game when you can’t even start the game up I know I press allow and once I press allow the start of the game and then I press play all it does loaded and then all buttons disappear and this happens every time every time I re-download it so fix it please I wanna play it but I can’t if there’s a bug
